{{Quote|Avan Post, Jedi Master from Chandrila, served with distinction in the Clone Wars.|An exhibit citing Avan Post's history|<ref name="TKT" />}}
'''Avan Post''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the last [[Standard decade/Legends|decades]] of both. [[Jedi training/Legends|Training]] his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] learner, [[Olana Chion/Legends|Olana Chion]], to [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Knighthood]], Post served on many battlefronts of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] between the Republic and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. In [[22 BBY/Legends|21.25 BBY]], the Master [[Death/Legends|perished]] fighting in the [[Battle of Ando]]. [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] honored Post's sacrifice, and the [[Galactic Museum/Legends|Galactic Museum]] created a special exhibit on the Republic's [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]], [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] hailing from the<ref name="TKT" /> [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]<ref name="EAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref> [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Chandrila/Legends|Chandrila]], Avan Post was accepted into the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], eventually reaching the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]].<ref name="TKT" /> At some point, Post took [[Olana Chion/Legends|Olana Chion]] as his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] learner, and both served together for over a [[Standard decade/Legends|decade]] until Chion reached the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]].<ref name="DB" />

In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] broke out between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].<ref name="TNEC" /> Post served the Republic with distinction on various battlefronts during the early stages of the conflict but [[Death/Legends|perished]] nine [[Standard month/Legends|months]] into the war during the [[Battle of Ando]] in [[Realspace/Legends|space]] over the planet after destroying seven [[Techno Union/Legends|Techno Union]] [[Hardcell-class interstellar transport/Legends|''Hardcell''-class interstellar transports]].<ref name="HNN" />

Recognizing «selfless valor in defense of the Republic and her worlds», [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] commemorated the honorable deeds of Jedi Knight Avan Post and Jedi Master [[Shaak Ti/Legends|Shaak Ti]] during a ceremony held at the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]], presenting the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] with a [[Ch'hala tree]] grove as a gift. In turn, [[Galactic Museum/Legends|Galactic Museum]] [[Master Curator]] [[Asran Headows]] created an exhibit honoring the fallen [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] Master on the Republic's [[Capital/Legends|capital]] world of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].<ref name="HNN" /> Nearly thirty [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after Post's demise,<ref name="HNN" /> in [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]],<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] and later Jedi [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]] discovered the exhibition, albeit damaged by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Horn activated a [[Hologram/Legends|hologram]] of Post and viewed a detailed history of the Jedi Master's career.<ref name="TKT" />

==Behind the scenes==
Avan Post first appeared in a hologram in ''[[X-Wing: The Krytos Trap]]'', a [[1996]] novel written by [[Michael A. Stackpole]]. In [[April]] [[2003]], Post was mentioned in ''[[Republic HoloNet News Core Edition 14:3:22]]'', an [[in-universe]] [[HoloNet News (Insider)|''Holonet News'']] issue published in [[Star Wars Insider 66|''Star Wars Insider'' 66]]. Post received an entry in the [[2008]] ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' and was mentioned in Olana Chion's entry in the [[StarWars.com]] [[Databank (original)|Databank]].
